overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a futuristic cyberpunk-style building interior during a heavy rainstorm. The player moves along glass walkways with metal structures, observing the rain falling through transparent barriers and approaching NPC characters in a high-end game engine environment with cinematic neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass walkway overlooking lower construction area

events.description: camera tilts down from ceiling to reveal heavy rain falling outside the glass barriers and debris below

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the glass ceiling structure then panning down to observe the rain and destruction below

entered.detail: transparent glass panels with black metal support framework overhead
thick industrial steel beams forming the ceiling structure
long horizontal white light fixture mounted on the wall
transparent glass wall separating walkway from open drop, heavy rain visible on other side
heavy falling rain visible through the glass barriers
rubble and concrete destruction visible on the lower level through the glass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking up at a futuristic glass ceiling with industrial metal beams. The camera slowly pans down to reveal heavy rain falling outside transparent glass barriers, with debris and destruction visible on a lower level. The environment is sheltered but exposed to the elements visually, with cool artificial lighting illuminating the scene.

events.description: begins walking forward along the glass walkway from stationary observation
two standing NPC characters come into view ahead on the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the reflective glass walkway toward two NPCs standing ahead near the exit

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress standing still facing toward the camera
person in white clothing standing near the left wall

entered.detail: transparent glass flooring reflecting the overhead lights
illuminated exit signage visible in the distance at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a glass walkway with transparent flooring and metal railings, approaching two standing NPC characters ahead. The heavy rain continues to fall outside the glass barriers on the right, while the walkway leads toward a distant exit sign. The two characters remain stationary as the player approaches, one wearing a distinctive red dress in the center of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a high-angle observation of a storm-lashed ceiling to a forward progression along a futuristic walkway. It begins by looking up at a glass ceiling supported by industrial metal beams before slowly panning down to reveal heavy rain cascading outside transparent barriers and debris scattered on a lower level. As the camera descends, the cool artificial lighting guides the view forward onto a glass walkway with transparent flooring and metal railings. The scene then expands as the camera advances toward a distant exit sign, passing the persistent rain on the right to approach two stationary NPC characters, including one woman in a distinctive red dress.
